testcase.name: Login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given I open the application url "BASE_URL"..............................skipped When I enter credential "BAHMNI_USERNAME" into "username"................skipped And I enter credential "BAHMNI_PASSWORD" into "password".................skipped And I click the "login" button...........................................skipped Then login should succeed away from "#/login"............................skipped And login should reach path "#/loginLocation"............................skipped When I select option "OPD-1" from "location".............................skipped And I click the "continue" button........................................skipped Then login should succeed away from "#/loginLocation"....................skipped And the page url should contain "BASE_DOMAIN"............................skipped
